title: Resources
subtitle: Texts, teachings, and trusted sources for the journey
meta_description: All Arunachala Samudra resources in one place: the Ramana library, free ebooks, daily teachings, articles, saint biographies, and trusted external sources on Ramana Maharshi.
body_html:
Everything on Arunachala Samudra in one place — the source texts, the saints, the daily wisdom, and trusted external resources for deeper study.

On this site

  • The Ramana Library — the source texts behind every teaching
  • Free Ebooks — downloadable guides and classic texts
  • Daily Sacred Teachings — a fresh teaching each day
  • Articles & Reflections — essays on the teachings and the path
  • Saints of Tiruvannamalai — the lineage of Arunachala
  • Girivalam Guide — the practice of circumambulating the hill
  • Curated Links & Further Study — trusted external sources
